name: OWASP ASVS
description: OWASP Application Security Verification Standard v4.0

requirements.requirement_text: Verify the use of a secure software development lifecycle that addresses security in all stages of development.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure SDLC policy, security gates in CI/CD pipeline documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate security activities into every phase of the SDLC with defined security gates before production deployment.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify the use of unique or appropriate session tokens rather than static API secrets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authentication architecture documentation, token lifecycle management
requirements.recommendation_text: Replace static API secrets with short-lived, rotatable session tokens or OAuth2 flows.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that trusted enforcement points such as access control gateways, servers, and serverless functions enforce access controls.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control architecture, API gateway authorization configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement centralized access control enforcement at API gateways and application servers, never relying solely on client-side controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that input and output controls are in place to enforce trust boundaries.
requirements.expected_evidence: Input validation standards, output encoding guidelines
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and enforce input validation and output encoding at all trust boundaries.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that all sensitive data is identified and classified into protection levels.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data classification policy, data inventory with classification labels
requirements.recommendation_text: Create a data classification scheme and label all sensitive data assets accordingly.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that user set passwords are at least 12 characters in length.
requirements.expected_evidence: Password policy documentation, authentication configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce minimum 12-character passwords with complexity requirements and breach password checking.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that anti-automation controls are effective at mitigating breached credential testing, brute force, and account lockout attacks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Account lockout policy, rate limiting configuration, CAPTCHA implementation
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement account lockout, rate limiting, and CAPTCHA on authentication endpoints.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that password recovery does not provide a different level of security than authentication.
requirements.expected_evidence: Password reset flow documentation, recovery security controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Ensure password recovery uses equally strong verification (MFA, secure tokens) as primary authentication.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application uses session tokens rather than static API secrets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Session management documentation, token configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Use secure session tokens with proper expiration, rotation, and invalidation on logout.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that multi-factor authentication is enforced for administrative accounts.
requirements.expected_evidence: MFA policy for admin accounts, MFA enrollment records
requirements.recommendation_text: Require MFA for all administrative and privileged accounts without exception.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify the application never reveals session tokens in URL parameters or error messages.
requirements.expected_evidence: Session handling code review, security testing results
requirements.recommendation_text: Store session tokens in secure HTTP-only cookies, never in URLs or client-side storage.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify the application uses session tokens rather than static API secrets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Session token implementation documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement session token rotation on privilege changes and invalidate sessions on logout.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application enforces access control rules on a trusted service layer.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authorization model documentation, access control test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce all authorization checks server-side; never rely on client-side access control.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application or framework enforces a strong anti-CSRF mechanism.
requirements.expected_evidence: CSRF protection implementation, SameSite cookie configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement CSRF tokens for all state-changing operations and set SameSite cookie attributes.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application has defenses against HTTP parameter pollution attacks.
requirements.expected_evidence: Input validation framework documentation, parameter handling standards
requirements.recommendation_text: Validate and sanitize all HTTP parameters; reject duplicate or unexpected parameters.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application sanitizes user input before passing to mail systems to protect against SMTP or IMAP injection.
requirements.expected_evidence: Input sanitization standards, email handling security controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Sanitize all user input used in email headers and body to prevent injection attacks.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that output encoding is relevant for the interpreter and context required.
requirements.expected_evidence: Output encoding standards, XSS testing results
requirements.recommendation_text: Apply context-appropriate output encoding (HTML, JavaScript, URL) for all user-controlled data.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that all cryptographic modules fail securely.
requirements.expected_evidence: Cryptographic standards documentation, algorithm selection policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Use only approved cryptographic algorithms and ensure modules fail securely without exposing keys.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that all random numbers, random file names, random GUIDs, and random strings are generated using approved random number generator.
requirements.expected_evidence: Cryptographic implementation review, RNG usage documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Use cryptographically secure random number generators (CSPRNG) for all security-sensitive random values.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application does not log credentials or payment card numbers.
requirements.expected_evidence: Logging policy, log sanitization configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement log sanitization to redact credentials, PII, and payment card data from all log outputs.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that security events are logged with sufficient detail to understand the event.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security event logging standards, log format documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Log all security-relevant events with timestamp, user identity, source IP, and action details.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that sensitive data is protected in storage and in transit.
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption policy, TLS configuration, database encryption documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Encrypt all sensitive data at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.2+).

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that sensitive data is not stored in browser storage (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies) unless encrypted.
requirements.expected_evidence: Client-side data handling standards, browser storage audit
requirements.recommendation_text: Avoid storing sensitive data in browser storage; if necessary, encrypt with server-managed keys.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that TLS is used for all client connectivity, and does not fall back to insecure protocols.
requirements.expected_evidence: TLS configuration, certificate management, SSL Labs scan results
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce TLS 1.2+ on all endpoints with strong cipher suites and valid certificates.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that a code analysis tool is in use that can detect potentially malicious code.
requirements.expected_evidence: SAST tool configuration, code analysis pipeline integration
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate SAST tools into the CI/CD pipeline to detect malicious or vulnerable code patterns.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify the application will only process business logic flows for the same user in sequential step order.
requirements.expected_evidence: Business logic flow documentation, workflow security controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce sequential workflow validation server-side to prevent step-skipping attacks.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application will not accept large files that could fill up storage or cause DoS.
requirements.expected_evidence: File upload policy, size limit configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce file size limits, type validation, and virus scanning on all upload endpoints.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that files obtained from untrusted sources are stored outside the web root.
requirements.expected_evidence: File storage architecture, upload handling documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Store uploaded files outside the web root and serve through controlled download endpoints.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that all application components use the same encodings and parsers to avoid parsing attacks.
requirements.expected_evidence: API security standards, parser configuration documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Standardize encoding and parsing across all API components; reject unexpected content types.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that RESTful web services use anti-automation controls for unauthenticated endpoints.
requirements.expected_evidence: API rate limiting configuration, throttling policies
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement rate limiting and throttling on all public API endpoints.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application build and deployment processes are performed in a secure and repeatable way.
requirements.expected_evidence: CI/CD pipeline security configuration, build process documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Secure CI/CD pipelines with signed artifacts, secret management, and immutable deployments.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that compiler flags are configured to enable all available buffer-overflow protections.
requirements.expected_evidence: Compiler configuration, binary protection documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Enable stack canaries, ASLR, and DEP/NX bit in all compiled binaries.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that every HTTP response contains a Content-Type header with a safe character set.
requirements.expected_evidence: HTTP security headers configuration, response header standards
requirements.recommendation_text: Set Content-Type with explicit charset on all responses and enable X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff.

requirements.requirement_text: Verify that the application server sets Content-Security-Policy and X-Content-Type-Options headers.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security headers configuration, CSP policy documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy comprehensive security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options.
